# Emorya Website

Emorya is a wellness rewards brand focused on everyday movement, recovery, routine tracking, and guided digital rewards.

## Primary website sections
- Home: https://oliversynergia-tech.github.io/emorya-site/
- Team: https://oliversynergia-tech.github.io/emorya-site/team.html
- Blog hub: https://oliversynergia-tech.github.io/emorya-site/blog/

## Blog content clusters
- Everyday movement: https://oliversynergia-tech.github.io/emorya-site/blog/category/everyday-movement/
- Fitness trends: https://oliversynergia-tech.github.io/emorya-site/blog/category/fitness-trends/
- Wellbeing: https://oliversynergia-tech.github.io/emorya-site/blog/category/wellbeing/
- Habits: https://oliversynergia-tech.github.io/emorya-site/blog/category/habits/
- Fitness guides: https://oliversynergia-tech.github.io/emorya-site/blog/category/fitness-guides/
- Fitness tech: https://oliversynergia-tech.github.io/emorya-site/blog/category/fitness-tech/
- Rewards and Web3: https://oliversynergia-tech.github.io/emorya-site/blog/category/rewards-web3/

## Editorial focus
This blog is built as a mainstream health, fitness, wellness, and movement discovery engine first. It emphasizes walking, habit-building, wellbeing, fitness culture, and gamified health tools. Emorya-specific reward, Web3, and token education are layered in where relevant, but the content is intentionally not crypto-first.

## Key concepts
- Everyday movement
- Walking
- Healthy habits
- Recovery
- Fitness trends
- Behavior change
- Gamified health
- Fitness technology
- Sustainable rewards
- Digital ownership
- Guided Web3 onboarding

## Best product explainer routes
- How it works: https://oliversynergia-tech.github.io/emorya-site/#how-it-works
- Tokenomics: https://oliversynergia-tech.github.io/emorya-site/#tokenomics
- Community: https://oliversynergia-tech.github.io/emorya-site/#community
- FAQ: https://oliversynergia-tech.github.io/emorya-site/#faq
- Download: https://oliversynergia-tech.github.io/emorya-site/#download
